scenes.title: Hook - The Question
scenes.script_text: Opening hook that poses the question everyone wonders about.
scenes.voiceover_text: Have you ever looked up at the sky and wondered why it's blue? It turns out the answer is more fascinating than you might think.
scenes.visual_notes: Text 'WHY IS THE SKY BLUE?' fades in over a gradient blue background. Subtle particle animation.

scenes.title: The Science - Rayleigh Scattering
scenes.script_text: Explains the science of Rayleigh scattering in simple terms.
scenes.voiceover_text: Sunlight contains all colors of the rainbow. When it hits Earth's atmosphere, the light scatters off tiny molecules. Shorter wavelengths like blue scatter way more than red. That scattered blue light comes at you from every direction, making the entire sky appear blue.
scenes.visual_notes: Animated diagram showing sunlight entering atmosphere, scattering. Blue rays scatter more than red rays. Clean infographic style.

scenes.title: Outro - Sunset Connection
scenes.script_text: Connects the science to sunsets and wraps up.
scenes.voiceover_text: And that's also why sunsets are red. The light travels through more atmosphere, so most blue gets scattered away before it reaches your eyes. Nature's physics, happening right above your head every single day.
scenes.visual_notes: Beautiful sunset gradient with text overlay. Fade to channel logo.
